name: SomeIpAddConsumedEventGroup
title: SomeIpAddConsumedEventGroup
syntax: dword SomeIpAddConsumedEventGroup( dword csiHandle, dword eventGroupId );
description: This function adds an Event Group to a Consumed Service Instance that was created by SomeIpCreateConsumedServiceInstance.
Objects of the Event Group can be registered as follows:
An Event Group can be removed again usign the SomeIpRemoveConsumedEventGroup function.

parameters.name: csiHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the Consumed Service Instance.

return: 0: An error occurred. The error can be evaluated using the SomeIpGetLastError function.
